Paul

Trusted by thousands of teams
Built for Pairing
Engineers deserve sharp tools
Generic screen sharing tools just won't cut it.
Tuple is purpose-built
    for an exceptional pairing experience.
Ridiculously crisp audio and video
Tuple streams in super high resolution (up to 5K) so you can read your pair's tiny programming
      font.
End-to-end encryption
All audio, video, and screen share data is end-to-end encrypted, and is never sent to Tuple's
      servers. We take your privacy extremely seriously.
Seamless collaboration
Snappy remote control combined with clear audio and video make you feel like you're sitting
      right next to your pair.

One click to swap who’s sharing
It just takes one click to switch who's sharing when you're on a call. Easily go back and
        forth with your pair on a tough problem.
Testimonials
Don't take our word for it
Here are some of the nice things people have said about Tuple.
Tuple has become
our default tool for remote pairing at Shopify
. The teams love it.
Farhan Thawar
VP of Engineering, Shopify
It's the best tool for remote pair programming.
Latency is important, keyboard binding all just works. It feels like you're working on a shared
      computer.
Andrés Taylor
Developer, PlanetScale
So impressed with Tuple. It makes
pair programming remotely with co-workers and friends fun again
.
Michael Feldstein
Staff Engineer, Figma
Tuple allows me to thrive as an independent developer
, easily chatting with freelance clients, mentoring others, and collaborating on open-source
      projects.
Mikaela Caron
Independent iOS Engineer
Tuple spread like wildfire throughout the entire Clerk team, and quickly became an
integral part of our internal communications
.
Braden Sidoti
Co-founder & CTO, Clerk
Small footprint
Respectful of system resources and screen real estate
Native where it counts
The core of Tuple is a natively compiled, cross-platform C++ engine. It's not just another Electron app.
Obsessed with performance
We've been hacking on Tuple for years to make it as fast and efficient as possible. We're stingy with your CPU cycles.
Runs in your menu bar
Do you hate a cluttered dock or task bar? Well, us too. Tuple stays out of your way until you need it.
Designed for privacy
Fearless
screen
sharing with
App Veil
Your teammates only see what you want them to see, nothing more.
Fearless
screen
sharing with App Veil
Hide sensitive apps and notifications, and share your desktop with confidence.
Workflow
Built for developers, by developers
We're programmers too. We built Tuple to fit the way engineers work.

Automate your workflow with Triggers
Tools for programmers should be programmable.
Triggers let you hook into Tuple's call
        events and run arbitrary code.
Learn more

Copy call link
Add a participant
Open Tuple popover
Toggle microphone
Keyboard shortcuts for everything
Keep your hands on the keyboard and stay in flow with fully customizable shortcuts.
For macOS and Windows
It doesn't matter whether your team is using macOS or Windows — Tuple works great on both.
Effective and fun
Liven up your pairing sessions
Build cool stuff with your teammates – and have a good time in the process.
Screen annotations
Draw or type on a shared screen to draw attention to something or emphasize a point. Or use
        Tuple as a shared virtual whiteboard.
Emoji reactions
Show the rest of team how you're feeling with on-screen emoji reactions.
Animations
Finally figure out that gnarly race condition? Drop a giant "ship it" animation into the
        pairing session.
❤️
🤯
🔥

👏

Pricing
Tuple pays for itself in happier, more productive engineers
Get started with a
14-day free trial
.
Engineering teams
$30
/
per user
per month
Unlimited pairing sessions
Pair with external collaborators for free
To pair with Tuple, only one of the users in the session must be a paid
                          user.
Learn more
Single sign-on (SSO)
Get started for free
Enterprises
Custom pricing available
Contact us for more information
Everything on the teams plan
Custom contracts
Payment via invoice/PO
Reduced per-user pricing at scale
Contact sales
No love, no pay.
If you're unhappy with
          Tuple at any point, we'll refund your most recent monthly payment.
90% off for a year for startups
If your company is less than two years old and has fewer than 50 employees, we'll add
              a one-year 90% discount to your subscription.
Apply for discount
Tuple is free for OSS
If you do significant OSS work, we'll donate free Tuple licenses to collaborate with
              contributors/maintainers.
Get Tuple for free
Testimonials
Developers talk about Tuple best
Here are some of the nice things folks have said about us.
Tuple is probably the highest rated tool we've implemented. The developers who use it
can't imagine working remote without it
.
Nick Cash
VP of Engineering, Jam City
I've been in meetings with 10 people on Tuple, cycling through who's driving, and
it's been incredibly productive
. If we had to try to do that on another platform, it wouldn't be worth it.
Cassidy Scheffer
Staff Software Developer, Wealthsimple
Tuple is integral for us as a remote team.
It creates the illusion that there is nothing in the way. It’s faster, easier and more
            seamless than anything else we’ve tried.
Ian Lesperance
Senior Principal Software Engineer, Vimeo
FAQ
Frequently asked questions
Here's what you need to know about your Tuple license, based on the questions we get asked
          the most.
What platforms do you support?
Tuple is available for macOS and Windows.
Does it cost anything to pair with people outside my organization?
Nope! Paid users (the default) can pair with external collaborators (clients,
            consultants, interviewees) for free. Learn more in
our docs
.
How do you handle security and privacy?
Carefully! Check out our
security details
and
privacy policy
.
Can I get a refund?
We're not in the business of making money from unhappy users. If you're unhappy with
            Tuple at any point, we'll refund your most recent monthly payment. See our
refund policy
for more details.
Tuple

Changelog
What's new in Tuple
The latest updates and improvements for macOS, Windows, and Linux.
View full changelog
macOS
macOS 3.1.0
Added
Personal rooms
: you now have a personal room which you can open to your contacts, or close if you want privacy. Learn more
Changed
Your personal room now stays open for you after everyone else leaves, instead of ending the call.
New trial accounts now start with local transcription enabled.
The bundled
tuple
CLI now includes a
whoami
command, a
rooms
command, and new filters for listing contacts.
More reliable app auto-updates
Fixed
Notifications now show a real avatar for people who aren't in your contacts
Stray scrollbar on the trial banner in the People popover
macOS
macOS 3.0.8
Added
Local call history
: You can now see a history of past calls that you've transcribed locally, and easily open a given transcript in your agent of choice. Learn more
macOS
macOS 3.0.7
Added
Local transcription (alpha)
: you can now transcribe your calls fully locally. This allows you to both recall past discussions and allow agents to participate on calls in real time. Learn more
CLI + MCP
: Tuple now ships with a CLI and MCP server. This provides agents with much richer affordances for interacting with calls, as well as allowing Tuple to be automated in new ways. Learn more
macOS
macOS 3.0.6
This build includes work on features that aren't enabled yet (storing transcripts in SQLite, CLI machinery).
macOS
macOS 3.0.5
This build also includes work on features that aren't enabled yet (a new Triggers window with a directory and built-in documentation, a "Find Triggers" menu command, and the
tuple
CLI bundled into the app). If you're interested in getting early access to this stuff, reach out to us!.
Tuple
© 2026 Tuple, LLC

analysis.name: Tuple
analysis.tagline: The best remote pair programming app on macOS and Windows
analysis.value_proposition: Purpose-built remote pair programming app delivering razor-sharp screen sharing, crisp audio, and seamless remote control for engineers.
analysis.ideal_customer: Distributed/remote engineering teams doing pair programming, plus independent developers and OSS maintainers

features.name: high-resolution screen sharing
features.description: Streams screen sharing in up to 5K resolution
features.evidence_quote: Tuple streams in super high resolution (up to 5K) so you can read your pair's tiny programming font.

features.name: end-to-end encryption
features.description: All audio, video, and screen share data is end-to-end encrypted
features.evidence_quote: All audio, video, and screen share data is end-to-end encrypted, and is never sent to Tuple's servers.

features.name: remote control
features.description: Snappy remote control of your pair's screen
features.evidence_quote: Snappy remote control combined with clear audio and video make you feel like you're sitting right next to your pair.

features.name: one-click sharing swap
features.description: Switch who's sharing with a single click during a call
features.evidence_quote: It just takes one click to switch who's sharing when you're on a call.

features.name: native cross-platform engine
features.description: Natively compiled C++ engine, not Electron
features.evidence_quote: The core of Tuple is a natively compiled, cross-platform C++ engine. It's not just another Electron app.

features.name: menu bar app
features.description: Runs from the menu bar to stay out of the way
features.evidence_quote: Tuple stays out of your way until you need it.

features.name: app veil
features.description: Hide sensitive apps and notifications while screen sharing
features.evidence_quote: Fearless screen sharing with App Veil… Hide sensitive apps and notifications

features.name: triggers
features.description: Run custom code in response to Tuple events (call start/end, participant join/leave)
features.evidence_quote: Run your own code in response to Tuple events

features.name: api
features.description: Public API for automation
features.evidence_quote: API — Run your own code in response to Tuple events

features.name: slack integration
features.description: Start Tuple calls right from Slack
features.evidence_quote: Start Tuple calls right from Slack

features.name: google calendar integration
features.description: Add a Tuple call link to Google Calendar events
features.evidence_quote: Add a Tuple call link to your calendar events

features.name: apple calendar integration
features.description: Add a Tuple call link to Apple Calendar events
features.evidence_quote: Same as above, but for Apple Calendar

features.name: macos app
features.description: Native macOS client
features.evidence_quote: Tuple is available for macOS and Windows.

features.name: windows app
features.description: Native Windows client
features.evidence_quote: Tuple is available for macOS and Windows.

features.name: linux app
features.description: Linux client in alpha
features.evidence_quote: Tuple for Linux alpha is available!

features.name: unlimited pairing sessions
features.description: No caps on number or length of pairing sessions
features.evidence_quote: Unlimited pairing sessions

features.name: external collaborator pairing
features.description: Pair with external users (clients, consultants) for free — only one paid seat required
features.evidence_quote: Pair with external collaborators for free

features.name: sso
features.description: Single sign-on included in the paid team plan
features.evidence_quote: Single sign-on (SSO)

features.name: group calls
features.description: Support for multi-participant calls with driver cycling
features.evidence_quote: I've been in meetings with 10 people on Tuple, cycling through who's driving

features.name: personal rooms
features.description: Persistent personal room you can open/close to contacts
features.evidence_quote: Personal rooms: you now have a personal room which you can open to your contacts, or close if you want privacy.

features.name: local transcription
features.description: Fully local call transcription (alpha)
features.evidence_quote: Local transcription (alpha): you can now transcribe your calls fully locally.

features.name: local call history
features.description: View history of past transcribed calls
features.evidence_quote: Local call history: You can now see a history of past calls that you've transcribed locally

features.name: agent participation on calls
features.description: AI agents can participate in real time via local transcription
features.evidence_quote: allow agents to participate on calls in real time

features.name: cli
features.description: Bundled tuple CLI with whoami, rooms, and contact filter commands
features.evidence_quote: The bundled tuple CLI now includes a whoami command, a rooms command

features.name: mcp server
features.description: Ships with an MCP server for agent integrations
features.evidence_quote: Tuple now ships with a CLI and MCP server.

features.name: git co-author trigger
features.description: Automatically add pair as Git co-author on commits
features.evidence_quote: add-git-coauthor … Co-Authored-By: #{name} <#{email}>

features.name: spotify pause trigger
features.description: Example trigger to auto-pause Spotify when a call starts
features.evidence_quote: tell application "Spotify" to pause

features.name: triggers directory
features.description: Browsable directory of triggers with built-in docs (in-progress)
features.evidence_quote: a new Triggers window with a directory and built-in documentation

features.name: auto-updates
features.description: Reliable in-app auto-updates
features.evidence_quote: More reliable app auto-updates

features.name: free trial
features.description: 14-day free trial with no commitment
features.evidence_quote: Get started with a 14-day free trial.

features.name: oss free licenses
features.description: Free Tuple licenses for significant OSS contributors/maintainers
features.evidence_quote: Tuple is free for OSS

features.name: startup discount
features.description: 90% off for a year for companies <2 years old and <50 employees
features.evidence_quote: 90% off for a year for startups

features.name: refund guarantee
features.description: Refund of most recent monthly payment if unhappy
features.evidence_quote: If you're unhappy with Tuple at any point, we'll refund your most recent monthly payment.

differentiators: End-to-end encryption with no data sent to Tuple servers
App Veil for hiding sensitive apps/notifications while sharing
Purpose-built for developers with Triggers, CLI, and MCP

recent_ships.what: tuple CLI expanded with whoami, rooms, and contact filter commands

recent_ships.what: Local call history for transcribed calls
recent_ships.source: macOS 3.0.8: Local call history: You can now see a history of past calls that you've transcribed locally

recent_ships.what: Local transcription alpha + CLI + MCP server for agents
recent_ships.source: macOS 3.0.7: Local transcription (alpha)… CLI + MCP: Tuple now ships with a CLI and MCP server.

recent_ships.what: Triggers directory window with built-in documentation (in-progress)

praised: "Tuple has become our default tool for remote pairing at Shopify. The teams love it." — Farhan Thawar, Shopify
"It's the best tool for remote pair programming. Latency is important, keyboard binding all just works." — Andrés Taylor, PlanetScale
"So impressed with Tuple. It makes pair programming remotely with co-workers and friends fun again." — Michael Feldstein, Figma
"Tuple is probably the highest rated tool we've implemented. The developers who use it can't imagine working remote without it." — Nick Cash, Jam City
"It creates the illusion that there is nothing in the way. It's faster, easier and more seamless than anything else we've tried." — Ian Lesperance, Vimeo

free_tier.limits: 14-day free trial only; free for OSS contributors and free for external collaborators pairing with a paid user

tiers.name: Engineering teams
tiers.headline_inclusions: Unlimited pairing sessions, free external collaborator pairing, SSO

tiers.name: Enterprises
tiers.headline_inclusions: Everything on teams + custom contracts, invoice/PO, reduced per-user pricing at scale

pricing.notes: Only one user in a pairing session must be paid — external collaborators pair free. 90% off for one year for startups <2yrs old and <50 employees. Free licenses for significant OSS work. Refund of most recent monthly payment if unhappy.
